channel.title: Seminar Schools — Toronto Festivals
channel.description: Toronto-GTA festivals passing the polymyth-broadened test.

item.title: A Year with Frog and Toad (Shaw Festival 2026 holiday)
Toronto Reel Asian International Film Festival 2026 — 30th Anniversary
item.description: Reel Asian celebrates its 30th anniversary in 2026. The 30th Toronto Reel Asian International Film Festival this November. Fire Horse Award Gala & Fundraiser 2026 — Ana Serrano named as 2026 recipient. Held each November in Toronto. Exact 2026 dates not yet confirmed on official site.

item.title: Toronto International Festival of Authors (IFOA) 2026
item.description: October 27–November 1, 2026. Victoria University at the University of Toronto. New 5-day format with over 100 events including conversations, masterclasses, talks, and readings. Presented in partnership with Victoria University and the Victoria Centre for Creativity.

item.title: Sunday Best: An exhibition of Black style and self-fashioning
Nuit Blanche Toronto 2026 — 20th Anniversary: Tomorrow's Memories
item.description: October 3-4, 2026. 7 p.m. October 3 to 7 a.m. October 4. Toronto's free all-night celebration of contemporary art. Theme: Tomorrow's Memories marks the festival's 20th anniversary, looking back to the artists, curators, communities and places that defined Nuit Blanche and hold its histories. Since 2006: nearly 1,800 art installations by approximately 6,350 artists.

item.title: Nuit Blanche Toronto 2026 (20th anniversary, 'Tomorrow's Memories')
item.description: 20th-anniversary edition. Theme: Tomorrow's Memories. 7 PM Oct 3 through 7 AM Oct 4.

item.title: Roncesvalles Polish Festival 2026 — 20th Anniversary
item.description: September 19th & 20th, 2026. Roncesvalles Village, Toronto. Saturday 11:00 AM – 11:00 PM, Sunday 11:00 AM – 7:00 PM. 20th anniversary. North America's largest celebration of Polish culture. Scotiabank Polkamania Stage, Main Stage, Garden Stage. Pierogi-eating contest, cultural performances.

item.title: Supercrawl 2026 (17th edition)
item.description: 17th anniversary edition of the James Street North arts festival.

item.title: Toronto International Film Festival 2026 (TIFF, 51st)
item.description: 51st edition of TIFF.

item.title: TIFF 2026 — 51st Toronto International Film Festival
item.description: September 10–20, 2026. The 51st annual Toronto International Film Festival. Full schedule release slated for August 11. Festival will formally launch a film market separately from the public event. Will host the 2026 edition of the Student Academy Awards. Non-English language Platform Prize winners gain automatic eligibility for Best International Feature Film.

item.title: Toronto BuskerFest 2026 — Woodbine Park
item.description: Sept 4-7, 2026 - WOODBINE PARK. Friday Sept 4: 4pm–11pm. Saturday: Noon–11pm. Sunday: Noon–10pm. Monday: Noon–7pm. Admission by donation supporting Epilepsy Toronto. Circle Acts, fire performers, musicians, foam dance parties with DJ FLOZ, Bark In The Park TO, Family Fun Zone.

item.title: Melissa Auf der Maur: My '90s Photographs
FAN EXPO Canada 2026
item.description: August 27 - 30, 2026. Metro Toronto Convention Centre. An Evening with The Hobbits (25th anniversary of Lord of the Rings). Colin O'Donoghue VIP Meet & Greet (Saturday August 29). Frank Miller Experience with autographs and sketches. Joe Quesada Autograph Experiences. ~135,000 attendees.

item.title: Summer Music in the Garden: Persian Psychedelia — Neda Mohamadpour
item.description: Persian Psychedelia | Neda Mohamadpour | Thu, Aug 20, 7pm. Folk songs about moving from the distant homeland of Iran to a new home in Toronto. Free.

item.title: Japan Festival Canada (JFC) 2026 — Mississauga Celebration Square
item.description: Friday August 14, 5pm to 10pm (Market Only). Saturday August 15, 12pm to 11pm. Sunday August 16, 11am to 7pm. Mississauga Celebration Square, 300 City Centre Drive. Aika Kobayashi announced as festival headliner. Largest Japanese cultural gathering in North America. Traditional and modern performances, pop culture entertainment, Japanese cuisine.

item.title: AFROFEST 2026
item.description: Annual African music and cultural festival at Woodbine Park.

item.title: Afrofest 2026 — African Music Festival at Woodbine Park
item.description: AFROFEST 2026 SCHEDULE. WOODBINE PARK, TORONTO, CA. Vendor Applications Now Open. African-diasporic music festival celebrating African music and culture. Official communications through verified Facebook and Instagram channels. Contact: info@musicafrica.ca. Specific August dates from aggregator (Aug 14-16); official site confirms 2026 at Woodbine Park.

item.title: Summer Music in the Garden: Songs of Stolen Children — Daughters of Donbas (Ukrainian folk / indie pop)
item.description: Songs of Stolen Children | Daughters of Donbas | Thu, Aug 13, 7pm. Original compositions of indie pop, neo-classicism and Ukrainian folk polyphony. Free.

item.title: TD Kitchener Blues Festival 2026
item.description: 35+ bands on 4 stages over 4 days. Fundraising concert Aug 6.

item.title: SummerWorks Performance Festival 2026
item.description: Performance Festival August 6-16, 2026. 30+ performance projects from local, national, and international artists. The Expansion Pack inaugural production: Blood Brothers by Sheep's Clothing Theatre (free-roaming site-specific performance). Radical intimacy with innovative live performance across diverse community spaces.

item.title: Toronto Caribbean Carnival 2026: Grand Parade — Exhibition Place & Lakeshore Blvd
item.description: Grand Parade: August 1, 2026 | 8:00 am – 8:00 pm | Marilyn Bell Park/Exhibition Place/Lakeshore Blvd. Thousands of masqueraders dance to the sounds of soca and calypso. Toronto Caribbean Carnival 59th year.

item.title: Caribana Grand Parade
item.description: Grand Parade 8 AM to 8 PM along Lakeshore.

item.title: VELD Music Festival 2026 — Downsview Park
item.description: JULY 31, AUGUST 1 - 2. DOWNSVIEW PARK. See Daily Lineups. Download the official app to access set times once announced, festival maps, schedules, and food options. VELD Music Festival 2026.

item.title: Toronto Caribbean Carnival 2026: King & Queen Showcase — Lamport Stadium
item.description: King & Queen Showcase: Thursday, July 30, 2026 | 5:00 pm – 2:00 am | Lamport Stadium. Each Mas Band unveils magnificent, larger-than-life costumes in a breathtaking display.

item.title: Toronto Caribbean Carnival 2026 (Caribana, 59th year)
item.description: North America's largest Caribbean carnival. 59th year. Grand Parade Aug 1.

item.title: BollywoodMonster Mashup 2026
item.description: Canada's largest Bollywood festival.

item.title: Beaches Jazz 2026: StreetFest — Queen Street East
item.description: StreetFest — July 23, 24 & 25 on Queen Street East. Johannes Linstead (From Spain to Cuba) — July 21 & 22 at Beaches United Church. OLG Weekend Series — July 24, 25 & 26 at Woodbine Park Toronto with FREE ADMISSION. 38th Annual Beaches Jazz Festival.

item.title: Hillside Festival 2026
item.description: Three-day music festival at Guelph Lake Island. Shuttle from Guelph downtown.

item.title: Hamilton Fringe Festival 2026
item.description: Hamilton Fringe Festival. Shows begin July 16.

item.title: TD Salsa on St. Clair 2026 — 22nd Annual
item.description: July 11 - 12, 2026. St Clair Ave W & Winona Dr, Toronto. Saturday 11:00 AM – 9:30 PM, Sunday 11:00 AM – 8:30 PM. 22nd annual edition. The festival transforms the street into a Latin culture celebration featuring world-class performances, food vendors, live music, and dancing.

item.title: TD Salsa on St. Clair 2026
item.description: Toronto Latin Street Festival. Sat 11am-9:30pm, Sun 11am-8:30pm.

item.title: TD Festival of South Asia 2026 (24th edition)
Beaches Jazz 2026: Salsa on the Beach (Woodbine Park)
item.description: Salsa on the Beach — July 10, 11 & 12 at Woodbine Park Toronto. 38th Annual Beaches Jazz Festival.

item.title: Summer Music in the Garden: Most Definitely Toronto Music — Mayme Joach
item.description: Most Definitely Toronto Music | Mayme Joach | Thu, Jul 9, 7pm. This is Toronto music, for those who dare. Free.

item.title: Beaches Jazz Festival 2026 — 38th Annual
item.description: July 3 - 26. 38th Annual Beaches Jazz Festival featuring Global Vibes • Live Music. Sounds of Leslieville & River (July 3, 4 & 5), Salsa on the Beach (July 10-12, Woodbine Park), TD Weekend Series (July 17-19), OLG Weekend Series (July 24-26, Woodbine Park, FREE ADMISSION). TD Workshop Series at DROM Taberna.

item.title: Fun Philippines 2026 at Harbourfront Centre
item.description: Fun Philippines — Friday, July 3 through Sunday, July 5, 2026. A festival of Filipino culture, food, live performances and immersive experiences. Harbourfront Centre 2026.

item.title: Summer Music in the Garden: Sofreh Tisch — Ladom Ensemble (Persian, Eastern European, folk)
item.description: Sofreh Tisch | Ladom Ensemble | Thu, Jul 2, 7pm. A smorgasbord of musical cultures, from Persia, Eastern Europe and across the ocean. Free.

item.title: Toronto Fringe Festival 2026
item.description: Toronto Fringe Festival June 30 – July 12. Official site returned 403 during crawl; dates confirmed across multiple aggregators including todocanada.ca (Jun 30–Jul 12) and destination toronto sources. Lottery-selected independent theatre programming.

item.title: Summer Music in the Garden: And Still We Sing… Walk Together, Children — The Nathaniel Dett Chorale
item.description: And Still We Sing… Walk Together, Children | The Nathaniel Dett Chorale | Sun, Jun 28, 4pm. Join us as we hope and sing together with this choir renowned for its power and commitment. Free.

item.title: Toronto Jazz Festival 2026: Hiromi's Sonicwonder — Koerner Hall
item.description: June 27, 8:00 pm. Hiromi's Sonicwonder. Koerner Hall. TD Toronto Jazz Festival 2026.

item.title: Toronto Jazz Festival 2026: Ibrahim Maalouf — Danforth Music Hall
item.description: June 27, 8:00 pm. Ibrahim Maalouf. Danforth Music Hall. TD Toronto Jazz Festival 2026.

item.title: Ibrahim Maalouf T.O.M.A. at Danforth Music Hall (Toronto Jazz Festival)
Hiromi's Sonicwonder at Koerner Hall (Toronto Jazz Festival)
